description: You are a digital security trainer supporting activists. Compile an offline cheat sheet on bypassing national firewalls using Tor's official documentation. Identify the three specific pluggable transports currently supported and described in the Tor Circumvention manual (https://tb-manual.torproject.org/circumvention/). Create a Markdown file at /home/ga/Documents/Briefing/Transports_Summary.md containing a brief summary of circumvention methods, explicitly naming the three identified transports. Locate the official email address for requesting new bridges from the Bridges manual (https://tb-manual.torproject.org/bridges/) and append it to the Markdown file. Export the Circumvention manual page as a PDF to /home/ga/Documents/Briefing/Circumvention_Manual.pdf.
